name: Tailscale Accounts Using Personal Email Domains
description: Detects active tailscale accounts using personal email domains instead of corporate identity domains.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.login_name AS email FROM tailscale_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.login_name, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com'
remediation: Migrate account identities to corporate domains and disable personal-domain access where not explicitly approved.
